missing: File-not-found case raises `GoalValidationError` with descriptive message

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Splits on `## {section_name}` headings only for the 9 known sections
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _SECTION_HEADING_RE regex with re.MULTILINE that matches only the 9 whitelisted section names. Tests TestSplitSectionsHappyPath and TestSplitSectionsEmbeddedHeadings verify only known headings are treated as boundaries.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _SECTION_HEADING_RE regex with re.MULTILINE that matches only the 9 whitelisted section names. Tests TestSplitSectionsHappyPath and TestSplitSectionsEmbeddedHeadings verify only known headings are treated as boundaries.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Returns dict mapping section name to body text
criteria_verification.evidence: split_sections() returns dict[str, str] mapping section name to body text. test_returns_dict_with_nine_keys and test_all_required_keys_present verify this contract.
criteria_verification.notes: split_sections() returns dict[str, str] mapping section name to body text. test_returns_dict_with_nine_keys and test_all_required_keys_present verify this contract.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Strips leading/trailing whitespace from section bodies
criteria_verification.evidence: Body text is stripped via content[body_start:body_end].strip(). test_section_bodies_stripped explicitly asserts all bodies equal their stripped form.
criteria_verification.notes: Body text is stripped via content[body_start:body_end].strip(). test_section_bodies_stripped explicitly asserts all bodies equal their stripped form.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Handles inconsistent whitespace around headings (extra blank lines, trailing spaces)
criteria_verification.evidence: Regex uses \s* at end of heading pattern to tolerate trailing spaces. Body extraction uses .strip(). TestSplitSectionsWhitespace class has 3 tests covering extra blank lines, trailing spaces, and no blank line between heading and body.
criteria_verification.notes: Regex uses \s* at end of heading pattern to tolerate trailing spaces. Body extraction uses .strip(). TestSplitSectionsWhitespace class has 3 tests covering extra blank lines, trailing spaces, and no blank line between heading and body.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Embedded `##` headings within section content are preserved as content, not treated as boundaries
criteria_verification.evidence: Whitelist regex only matches the 9 known section names, so '## Sub-heading within Goal' or '### Sub-subsection' are NOT matched. TestSplitSectionsEmbeddedHeadings has 3 tests verifying embedded H2/H3 headings stay in body content.
criteria_verification.notes: Whitelist regex only matches the 9 known section names, so '## Sub-heading within Goal' or '### Sub-subsection' are NOT matched. TestSplitSectionsEmbeddedHeadings has 3 tests verifying embedded H2/H3 headings stay in body content.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Raises `GoalValidationError` identifying each missing section when any required section is absent
criteria_verification.evidence: After building sections dict, a list comprehension collects all missing section names and raises GoalValidationError with a comma-separated list. test_one_missing_section_raises verifies single missing section is identified.
criteria_verification.notes: After building sections dict, a list comprehension collects all missing section names and raises GoalValidationError with a comma-separated list. test_one_missing_section_raises verifies single missing section is identified.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Reports ALL missing sections at once (not just the first)
criteria_verification.evidence: Missing sections collected into a list and joined into a single error message. test_multiple_missing_sections_all_reported asserts all 3 missing section names appear in the error message.
criteria_verification.notes: Missing sections collected into a list and joined into a single error message. test_multiple_missing_sections_all_reported asserts all 3 missing section names appear in the error message.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Empty GOAL.md raises error indicating no sections found
criteria_verification.evidence: When all 9 sections are missing (empty input), raises GoalValidationError with 'No sections found' message. test_empty_string_raises, test_whitespace_only_raises, and test_content_without_any_known_headings_raises verify this.
criteria_verification.notes: When all 9 sections are missing (empty input), raises GoalValidationError with 'No sections found' message. test_empty_string_raises, test_whitespace_only_raises, and test_content_without_any_known_headings_raises verify this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: File-not-found case raises `GoalValidationError` with descriptive message

criteria_verification.evidence: No encoding/decoding is performed; Python str preserves Unicode natively. test_unicode_content_preserved verifies emojis, accented characters (cafe, naive) survive round-trip.
criteria_verification.notes: No encoding/decoding is performed; Python str preserves Unicode natively. test_unicode_content_preserved verifies emojis, accented characters (cafe, naive) survive round-trip.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
criteria_verification.evidence: Ran `ruff check` (All checks passed!) and `ruff format` (2 files already formatted) on both modified files with zero errors.
criteria_verification.notes: Ran `ruff check` (All checks passed!) and `ruff format` (2 files already formatted) on both modified files with zero errors.
